civilization.name: Demo Commonwealth
civilization.abilityDescription: Cities receive balanced production and culture support for early testing.

leader.name: Avery Vale
leader.abilityDescription: Gain steady science and trade bonuses without relying on official assets.

text.leaderIntro: A pragmatic leader focused on learning, exchange, and careful growth.
text.civilizationIntro: A test civilization designed for generator verification.
text.loadingScreen: Build a durable society through measured ambition and shared knowledge.
text.greeting: Welcome. Let us compare discoveries and trade fairly.
text.denounce: Your promises have become too thin to trust.
text.declareWar: We will not wait while your threat grows unchecked.
text.defeat: The experiment ends here, but its lessons remain.
